Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The results show mild hypoglycemia, low HDL cholesterol, slightly elevated chloride, and low total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Renal function and lipid profile are otherwise within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Clinical correlation is recommended, especially regarding glucose management and possible causes of low HDL and metabolic acidosis.
